task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and a PDF file is provided at /home/user/Documents/attention_paper.pdf.

Attach /home/user/Documents/attention_paper.pdf to the existing item 'Attention Is All You Need' as a stored child attachment. After attaching, that item must have at least one PDF attachment child and must still exist. Leave Zotero running.
